def positive_exception_logged_and_then_re_raised_redundantly():
    rule_id = "exception_logged_and_then_re_raised_redundantly"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Exception logged at ERROR level and then re-raised, producing duplicate error log entries."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
